docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO AMEND CLAIM (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY BROWN, KIMBERLY AS TO DEFENDANT SASSANI, BOB VIRGIN HOTEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONITNUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO NOV-4-19 AT 1:30 P.M. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-04-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF FIALED TO FILE AND SERVE AMENDED CLAIM AS INSTRUCED BY THE COURT AT THE HEARING OF NOV-15-2019. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, KIMBERLY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT SASSANI, BOB VIRGIN HOTEL

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF KIMBERLY BROWN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT BOB SASSANI VIRGIN HOTEL IS PRESENT.PREVIOUSLY SUBPOENED WITNESS FOR PLAINTIFF MR. LAVINE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AND WITNESS ARE EXCUSED AT 1:40 P.M. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2019 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-15-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KIMBERLY BROWN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BOB SASSANI IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. DEFENDANT WILL NOT WAIVE SERVICE ISSUES. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2019 - CONTINUED TO AMEND CLAIM JAN-16-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KIMBERLY BROWN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BOB SASSANI VIRGIN HOTEL IS PRESENT. SUBPOENAED PLAINTIFF'S WITNESS MR. LAVINE IS PRESENT. COURT FINDS THAT THE WRONG PARTY WAS NAMED IN THIS MATTER. PLAINTIFF IS TO AMEND CLAIM AND SERVE CORRECT AGENT OF SERVICE. PARTIES WERE ASKED TO BRING SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ROBERT SASSANI FILED BY DEFENDANT SASSANI, BOB VIRGIN HOTEL
